text: Joe's Garage. Date: 2023-10-01. Vehicle: 2021 Ford F-150. Services: Oil change ($65.00), Tire rotation ($20.00). Total: $85.00. Tax: $5.00. Grand Total: $90.00. Note: Customer requested we also check the brakes, they look fine.
